title: The Escalating Global A.I. Arms Race
summary_full: China, the U.S., Russia and others have ramped up their contest over artificial-intelligence-backed weapons and military systems. The buildup has been compared to the dawn of the nuclear weapons age.
summary_public: China, the U.S., Russia and others have ramped up their contest over artificial-intelligence-backed weapons and military systems. The buildup has been compared to the dawn of the nuclear weapons age.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Russia and others have ramped up their contest over artificial-intelligence-backed weapons
